name: Twin Gates
answer1:
Yes, Vesper is a
fair village.
question:
Hast thou come
a long way?
yes:
We are honored
by the visit of
one on the
quest!
no:
We are honored
by the visit of
one on the
quest!

name: Servile
answer1:
I know of the
skull of Mondain
the Wizard!
answer2:
To use it for
any reason is a
sign of great
evil, and no
virtue!
question:
Hast thou
heard of it?

name: Traveling Dan
look:
Short rotund man
with a hat and
vest.
answer1:
I am here to
repair goods at
the guild shop.
answer2:
I know the world
is round!
question:
Been to the
guild shop?

name: Balthasar
answer1:
Serfs work hard
for little pay!
answer2:
I work the
fields for my
master!
question:
Dost thou have
a master?
yes:
I hope he or she
is a kind one!

name: Plain
answer1:
When the 3
principles of
virtue combine
in eight ways
pride has no
virtue!
answer2:
To be proud is
not a virtue,
and so Magincia
was destroyed!
Humility is the
virtue that
remains!
question: A

name: Simple
answer2:
The shrine lies
on the north
bank of the isle
of the abyss and
is guarded by
endless hoards
of daemons!
question: Know the isle?

name: Gem
answer1:
I can help thee
with the mantra!
answer2:
Since humility
is the opposite
of pride, so is
its mantra!
question:
Know ye the
mantra of pride?

name: Joseph
job:
I am but a
humble shepherd.
answer1:
I am on a
pilgrimage unto
the shrine of
humility!
answer2:
It is on the
dark island!
question:
Did thou know
that there is no
shrine of pride?
no:
Pride is not a
virtue of the
avatar!

name: Friday
job:
I shall warn
thee against
taking this
gold!
question:
Dost thou intend
to take it?
yes:
That would not
reflect well
upon thy
virtues!

name: Randal
answer1:
One >must< visit
each shrine for
1, 2 & 3 cycles
each for thy
paths to be
clear!
question:
Dost thou visit
them often?
no:
Make that the
first goal along
thy path to
avatarhood!

name: Dirgen
answer1:
Strive ye to
know and
develop the
virtue within
thee.
answer2:
The Seer
Hawkwind should
be consulted
>often< for he
can see within
thee!
question: Dost thou?
no:
Thou shalt
surely stray
from the path!

name: Shazbot
answer1:
I dare thee to
ask me about
Nate the snake!
answer2:
Well, it's a
long story and
we haven't the
time.
question: Don't thou?
yes:
Well good, I
try to be!
no:
Ah, too bad, I
thought I was.

name: Flatbush
question:
Hast thou
been to Yew?
no:
Calumny knows
the quickness
spell! Seek
him out!

name: Corkrin
job:
I travel these
fair lands to
spread the
virtues!
answer1:
To know thy
progress on the
paths of virtue
one >must< visit
the Seer
Hawkwind often!
question:
Dost thou
do this?
no:
Thou must or
thou may stray!

name: Dyka
job:
I am a thief, I
like to borrow!
answer1:
My favorite
things to borrow
are horses!
answer2:
You can steal
horses in the
towne Paws!
question:
Art thou
a thief?
yes:
Watch out for
the bull in the
corral!
